title: Wall Hologram
result_description: A glowing sci-fi hologram appears on a blank wall and you react to it as if it's really there.

inputs.name: reaction_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Lock the camera on a tripod facing the wall where the hologram will appear. Act out reacting to / interacting with the empty wall so your eyeline and gestures sell it.

inputs.name: hologram_footage
inputs.what_to_film: Hologram stock footage on a black background.

params.note: drops the black background so only the glowing hologram shows
scale and position onto the wall
keyframe position if the camera or subject moves
mask if part of the hologram should be hidden behind you
add a subtle blue glow / sci-fi sound effect to finish

result.description: Glowing hologram sits convincingly on the wall and you react to it.
success_criteria: Hologram has no visible black box (Screen blend clean)
Hologram stays locked to the wall
Eyeline and reaction match the hologram
